stemHtml:
VTSP CNL AD WRNG 2 300100/300300
This message means:

options.a: There is an aerodrome warning between 01:00Z and 03:00Z on the 30th of the month.
options.b: There are two occasional warnings for a certain weather phenomena.
options.c: The aerodrome warning number 2 issued at VTSP is canceled.
options.d: The aerodrome VTSP is closed during the mentioned timeframe.
